下季料增至12隊

【本報訊】隨港超聯上周六煞科，多支港超聯球會已着手部署下季的組軍，由於理文與流浪來季「分手」，各自組軍參賽，而港甲晨曦亦有意升班，下季港超聯料不少於12隊參賽。

第三屆港超聯煞科後，和富大埔、理文流浪、香港飛馬、標準灝天及富力等已收「咧」。

理文與流浪「分手」
據悉多支隊伍已為來季部署，其中今季借流浪會籍參賽的理文來季與流浪分道揚鑣，流浪高層已表明下季再以標準流浪名義參賽，至於理文正向足總申請以贊助會員身份續戰，目前正待董事局審批。灝天亦會與標準「分家」，消息指灝天已與新贊助合商議續組軍，而甲組冠軍晨曦可能獲新贊助商支持有意升班。消息人士稱，足總上周舉行港職聯會議，港甲冠、亞軍晨曦及黃大仙也有代表列席，惟最終有多少隊參賽仍有待港超聯發牌小組審批。記者：曾雁平

下季料增至12隊

【本報訊】隨港超聯上周六煞科，多支港超聯球會已着手部署下季的組軍，由於理文與流浪來季「分手」，各自組軍參賽，而港甲晨曦亦有意升班，下季港超聯料不少於12隊參賽。

第三屆港超聯煞科後，和富大埔、理文流浪、香港飛馬、標準灝天及富力等已收「咧」。

理文與流浪「分手」
據悉多支隊伍已為來季部署，其中今季借流浪會籍參賽的理文來季與流浪分道揚鑣，流浪高層已表明下季再以標準流浪名義參賽，至於理文正向足總申請以贊助會員身份續戰，目前正待董事局審批。灝天亦會與標準「分家」，消息指灝天已與新贊助合商議續組軍，而甲組冠軍晨曦可能獲新贊助商支持有意升班。消息人士稱，足總上周舉行港職聯會議，港甲冠、亞軍晨曦及黃大仙也有代表列席，惟最終有多少隊參賽仍有待港超聯發牌小組審批。記者：曾雁平


一半都係西波



yes, 有十二隊, 可能要動用我谷先夠場用(如果有人想用)!

希望D 波編好D, 唔好再黎一日4場波, 但有3場同時開波

飛馬, 南華 - 大球隊

元朗 - 大陂頭
大埔 - 大埔
黃大仙 - 斧山道
流浪 - 九龍灣
晨曦 - 青衣
理文 - 深水埗
灝天 - 將軍澳

據悉多支隊伍已為來季部署，其中今季借流浪會籍參賽的理文來季與流浪分道揚鑣，流浪高層已表明下季再以標準流浪名義參賽，至於理文正向足總申請以贊助會員身份續戰，目前正待董事局審批。灝天亦會與標準「分家」，消息指灝天已與新贊助合商議續組軍，而甲組冠軍晨曦可能獲新贊助商支持有意升班。消息人士稱，足總上周舉行港職聯會議，港甲冠、亞軍晨曦及黃大仙也有代表列席，惟最終有多少隊參賽仍有待港超聯發牌小組審批。記者：曾雁平

今季港超聯有六支球隊的平均入場人數有所上升，增幅最多是九巴元朗，有兩成六 ，其次是棄香港大球場改以將軍澳運動場及旺角場為主場的南華，增近兩成，但平均不足1,400人；至於一哥傑志亦升一成六，平均每場有1,850名球迷。衞冕東方今季減少投放資源在推廣上，但受惠於煞科戰爆棚 而扭轉季內跌勢，增加百分之一 ，已足以成港超之冠 ，平均每場有1,923人。
港會與富力實力有限，無法吸引球迷，其中前者主場賽事，入場人數從未過千，最多只是600餘人，而富力以向來最「趕客」的小西灣運動場作為主場，加上實力不強，季內最少球迷的五場賽事全與該隊有關，上周六對理文流浪只得100名球迷又創新低。

今季港超聯有六支球隊的平均入場人數有所上升，增幅最多是九巴元朗，有兩成六 ，其次是棄香港大球場改以將軍澳運動場及旺角場為主場的南華，增近兩成，但平均不足1,400人；至於一哥傑志亦升一成六，平均每場有1,850名球迷。衞冕東方今季減少投放資源在推廣上，但受惠於煞科戰爆棚 而扭轉季內跌勢，增加百分之一 ，已足以成港超之冠 ，平均每場有1,923人。
港會與富力實力有限，無法吸引球迷，其中前者主場賽事，入場人數從未過千，最多只是600餘人，而富力以向來最「趕客」的小西灣運動場作為主場，加上實力不強，季內最少球迷的五場賽事全與該隊有關，上周六對理文流浪只得100名球迷又創新低。

我記得頑皮五兄弟　無聊沒作為
無知不聰慧　騎著舊單車鬥高低　
亂去將毛蟲放書櫃　來愚弄女仔
發育期沉迷漫畫裡　故事無稽　飛出天際

曾經這一個笨蛋　射波窗框也踢散
校規不會睇一眼　罰缺點抄功課都偷懶
成績統統要吃蛋　校徽遮掩再去玩
大考悲壯的一晚　物理科真的那麼艱難
畢業禮　頑童造反　紀念冊　頑童漸散
再也不再沉迷　山雞與浩南

到這天頑皮五兄弟　勤勞便有為
忙碌講經濟　時常望攀登上天梯
大個仔時常靠關係　和時代接軌
發育期無聊但珍貴　這份純真　一一荒廢

如今這一個悶蛋　下班都很怕老闆
重覆穿著的西褲　驟眼間穿得已多麼殘
名車供得要破產　大屋只得四塊板
孩子出世一眨眼　像那天天真過的少男
生命線　何來任揀　生活會　淪為習慣
以蟻速向前行　這可笑戇男

愉園今季獲國體動力董事長陳志實擔任足主，同時與車路士足球學校(香港)合作，獲該校安排1999年梯隊的小港腳及教練鮑家耀、陸冠邦等披上愉園球衣出戰丙組，並由岑國培擔任球隊主教練，陳志實相信陣中小將未來隨球隊踢乙組甚至升上甲組後，有能力成為核心，他說球隊目標是「三年升上港超」：「一年上一個台階，目前已成功升上乙組，希望明年升甲組、後年上超聯。」

岑國培就表示，教練團已在商討下季的人腳需要及人選，為來季角逐乙組部署
除德帥 同白雀做乜春

岑國培就表示，教練團已在商討下季的人腳需要及人選，為來季角逐乙組部署

今季港超聯有六支球隊的平均入場人數有所上升，增幅最多是九巴元朗，有兩成六 ，其次是棄香港大球場改以將軍澳運動場及旺角場為主場的南華，增近兩成，但平均不足1,400人；至於一哥傑志亦升一成六，平均每場有1,850名球迷。衞冕東方今季減少投放資源在推廣上，但受惠於煞科戰爆棚 而扭轉季內跌勢，增加百分之一 ，已足以成港超之冠 ，平均每場有1,923人。
港會與富力實力有限，無法吸引球迷，其中前者主場賽事，入場人數從未過千，最多只是600餘人，而富力以向來最「趕客」的小西灣運動場作為主場，加上實力不強，季內最少球迷的五場賽事全與該隊有關，上周六對理文流浪只得100名球迷又創新低。

Lum Called To Join National Squad

Avikash Chand
Fiji FA Media

Vodafone Fiji national coach Christhope Gamel on his Hong Kong tour has identified a Fijian footballer playing in the Hong Kong Premier League.

Gamel said he met Jared Christhoper Lum who is an Australian born but his ancestors were from Fiji.

“We will have to see his eligibility before he could join us for the match against New Caledonia,”Gamel said.

He said Lum was very much interested to play for Fiji and was a very stylish mid-fielder.

“He is a mid-fielder and uses both his right and left feet, the French man said.

Lum he said played in Australia for some time before heading to Hong Kong.”

The 25 year old plays for Kitchee Football Club and is 1.76 in height.

In his 20 appearance he had scored 14 goals for his club.
He could feature for Fiji in the FIFA World Cup Stage Three qualifier against New Caledonia in June.

Captain Roy Krishna, James Hoyt and Reenal Prasad are overseas based players in the national side.

隨港超聯上周六煞科，多支港超聯球會已着手部署下季的組軍，由於理文與流浪來季「分手」，各自組軍參賽，而港甲晨曦亦有意升班，下季港超聯料不少於12隊參賽。
第三屆港超聯煞科後，和富大埔、理文流浪、香港飛馬、標準灝天及富力等已收「咧」。

理文與流浪「分手」
據悉多支隊伍已為來季部署，其中今季借流浪會籍參賽的理文來季與流浪分道揚鑣，流浪高層已表明下季再以標準流浪名義參賽，至於理文正向足總申請以贊助會員身份續戰，目前正待董事局審批。灝天亦會與標準「分家」，消息指灝天已與新贊助合商議續組軍，而甲組冠軍晨曦可能獲新贊助商支持有意升班。消息人士稱，足總上周舉行港職聯會議，港甲冠、亞軍晨曦及黃大仙也有代表列席，惟最終有多少隊參賽仍有待港超聯發牌小組審批。

隨港超聯上周六煞科，多支港超聯球會已着手部署下季的組軍，由於理文與流浪來季「分手」，各自組軍參賽，而港甲晨曦亦有意升班，下季港超聯料不少於12隊參賽。
第三屆港超聯煞科後，和富大埔、理文流浪、香港飛馬、標準灝天及富力等已收「咧」。

理文與流浪「分手」
據悉多支隊伍已為來季部署，其中今季借流浪會籍參賽的理文來季與流浪分道揚鑣，流浪高層已表明下季再以標準流浪名義參賽，至於理文正向足總申請以贊助會員身份續戰，目前正待董事局審批。灝天亦會與標準「分家」，消息指灝天已與新贊助合商議續組軍，而甲組冠軍晨曦可能獲新贊助商支持有意升班。消息人士稱，足總上周舉行港職聯會議，港甲冠、亞軍晨曦及黃大仙也有代表列席，惟最終有多少隊參賽仍有待港超聯發牌小組審批。

不少於12隊

出爐港超聯盟主傑志今午公佈，英超勁旅熱刺本月26日在香港大球場與傑志進行表演賽，而賽事門票周三公佈發售，票價分680元、480元、330元及180元﹝特惠票﹞。賽事所有收益將全數撥歸傑志慈善基金，作為傑志賽馬會中心發展之用；賽事亦是香港回歸20年的慶祝活動之一。

Lum Called To Join National Squad

Avikash Chand
Fiji FA Media

Vodafone Fiji national coach Christhope Gamel on his Hong Kong tour has identified a Fijian footballer playing in the Hong Kong Premier League.

Gamel said he met Jared Christhoper Lum who is an Australian born but his ancestors were from Fiji.

“We will have to see his eligibility before he could join us for the match against New Caledonia,”Gamel said.

He said Lum was very much interested to play for Fiji and was a very stylish mid-fielder.

“He is a mid-fielder and uses both his right and left feet, the French man said.

Lum he said played in Australia for some time before heading to Hong Kong.”

The 25 year old plays for Kitchee Football Club and is 1.76 in height.

In his 20 appearance he had scored 14 goals for his club.
He could feature for Fiji in the FIFA World Cup Stage Three qualifier against New Caledonia in June.

Captain Roy Krishna, James Hoyt and Reenal Prasad are overseas based players in the national side.

Lum Called To Join National Squad

Avikash Chand
Fiji FA Media

Vodafone Fiji national coach Christhope Gamel on his Hong Kong tour has identified a Fijian footballer playing in the Hong Kong Premier League.

Gamel said he met Jared Christhoper Lum who is an Australian born but his ancestors were from Fiji.

“We will have to see his eligibility before he could join us for the match against New Caledonia,”Gamel said.

He said Lum was very much interested to play for Fiji and was a very stylish mid-fielder.

“He is a mid-fielder and uses both his right and left feet, the French man said.

Lum he said played in Australia for some time before heading to Hong Kong.”

The 25 year old plays for Kitchee Football Club and is 1.76 in height.

In his 20 appearance he had scored 14 goals for his club.
He could feature for Fiji in the FIFA World Cup Stage Three qualifier against New Caledonia in June.

Captain Roy Krishna, James Hoyt and Reenal Prasad are overseas based players in the national side.

是次門票將於由5月10日（即今週三）早上10時起開始預售，球迷可透過www.stubhub.hk 訂購。大會亦已特別於每種票價中預留部分最好座位通過StubHub網站發售予公眾。

球迷亦可於5月15日（即下週一）早上10時起透過購票通網站www.cityline.com或電話（2111-5333）訂購門票；此外，他們亦可選擇前往其銷售點親身購票。

票價分為：港幣＄680、港幣＄480、港幣＄330，而學生及長者的優惠門票定價為港幣＄180。為了讓家長與子女能夠一起觀賞球賽，位於主層的港幣＄330門票以及優惠門票將不設劃位。根據購票通的規條，球迷每次交易最多可訂購6張門票。

Lum Called To Join National Squad

Avikash Chand
Fiji FA Media

Vodafone Fiji national coach Christhope Gamel on his Hong Kong tour has identified a Fijian footballer playing in the Hong Kong Premier League.

Gamel said he met Jared Christhoper Lum who is an Australian born but his ancestors were from Fiji.

“We will have to see his eligibility before he could join us for the match against New Caledonia,”Gamel said.

He said Lum was very much interested to play for Fiji and was a very stylish mid-fielder.

“He is a mid-fielder and uses both his right and left feet, the French man said.

Lum he said played in Australia for some time before heading to Hong Kong.”

The 25 year old plays for Kitchee Football Club and is 1.76 in height.

In his 20 appearance he had scored 14 goals for his club.
He could feature for Fiji in the FIFA World Cup Stage Three qualifier against New Caledonia in June.

Captain Roy Krishna, James Hoyt and Reenal Prasad are overseas based players in the national side.

優材計劃

冇人講斐濟召許許許入隊?

林恩許的身世比較複雜，祖父的家人在小時候便因工作移居斐濟，到林恩許的祖父長大後便到了一間航空公司工作，結識了在港生活的祖母，並在斐濟誕下林恩許父親，後來祖父因工作不時飛往斐濟、香港及澳洲，最後更決定長居斐濟雪梨，父親便在此地成長及結識了為蘇格蘭的母親，因此林恩許是有香港及蘇格蘭混血的澳洲人。2016年6月4日，林恩許與拍拖多年的澳洲籍女朋友結婚。

所以話 所謂假鬼既問題跟本就係垃圾支那法影響
比著其他國家 要召呢啲球員有幾出奇

牛丸親身感謝東洋女球迷

東方主帥陳婉婷(牛丸)貴為亞洲最佳女教練，連日本也有球迷拜倒她石榴裙下。川崎前鋒女球迷日中信子和高穚友香在首回合隨隊到香港觀看球賽，誰不知被帥氣的牛丸吸引到，更在香港機場買下《足球周刊》第73期(牛丸為封面人物)一書，以及畫了牛丸的應援旗，希望今次牛丸來日本作客時可以給她簽名留念。3位球迷在太陽下等待牛丸2個多小時，她下車知道後當然二話不說特意上前為信子和友香簽名，並合照道謝。

Lum Called To Join National Squad

Avikash Chand
Fiji FA Media

Vodafone Fiji national coach Christhope Gamel on his Hong Kong tour has identified a Fijian footballer playing in the Hong Kong Premier League.

Gamel said he met Jared Christhoper Lum who is an Australian born but his ancestors were from Fiji.

“We will have to see his eligibility before he could join us for the match against New Caledonia,”Gamel said.

He said Lum was very much interested to play for Fiji and was a very stylish mid-fielder.

“He is a mid-fielder and uses both his right and left feet, the French man said.

Lum he said played in Australia for some time before heading to Hong Kong.”

The 25 year old plays for Kitchee Football Club and is 1.76 in height.

In his 20 appearance he had scored 14 goals for his club.
He could feature for Fiji in the FIFA World Cup Stage Three qualifier against New Caledonia in June.

Captain Roy Krishna, James Hoyt and Reenal Prasad are overseas based players in the national side.

Lum Called To Join National Squad

Avikash Chand
Fiji FA Media

Vodafone Fiji national coach Christhope Gamel on his Hong Kong tour has identified a Fijian footballer playing in the Hong Kong Premier League.

Gamel said he met Jared Christhoper Lum who is an Australian born but his ancestors were from Fiji.

“We will have to see his eligibility before he could join us for the match against New Caledonia,”Gamel said.

He said Lum was very much interested to play for Fiji and was a very stylish mid-fielder.

“He is a mid-fielder and uses both his right and left feet, the French man said.

Lum he said played in Australia for some time before heading to Hong Kong.”

The 25 year old plays for Kitchee Football Club and is 1.76 in height.

In his 20 appearance he had scored 14 goals for his club.
He could feature for Fiji in the FIFA World Cup Stage Three qualifier against New Caledonia in June.

Captain Roy Krishna, James Hoyt and Reenal Prasad are overseas based players in the national side.
